reason: FlashInfer 0.6.12 exposes separate fp16/bf16-capable RoPE functions and append_paged_kv_cache, plus a fused rope_quantize_fp8_append_paged_kv_cache path. The fused path is FP8/quantized and includes Q/K/nope inputs, so it is not a direct semantic match for KernelArena fp16/bf16 K-RoPE + KV-cache-write contract rows. A latency comparison would be misleading without a separate FP8/MLA-specific benchmark.
claim_boundary: No FP8 result compared against fp16/bf16 contract rows
